target.title: fix(gateway): preserve raw external session aliases
target.body:
Closes #63005.

## Behavior addressed

External raw session keys such as `conversation:pair:...` should survive gateway session-key canonicalization. A nested `sessions_send`, agent-scoped lookup, checkpoint restore, or compaction checkpoint metadata write should resolve to the same stored session instead of splitting history across raw and `agent:<id>:` aliases.

## Root cause

`migrateAndPruneGatewaySessionStoreKey` canonicalized raw external keys before preserving the raw-key store entry as an alias of the canonical agent key. The first fix preserved that raw alias, but several mutation paths still replaced or deleted only the canonical `primaryKey`. That left the raw alias stale after replacement-style writes.

The latest ClawSweeper finding caught the remaining gap: `sessions.compaction.restore` and `persistSessionCompactionCheckpoint` also wrote only the canonical key, so checkpoint restore/metadata flows could diverge raw and canonical entries again.

## Fix

The migration helper now returns explicit `preservedAliasKeys`. Shared store helpers synchronize those aliases on writes and remove them on delete. Replacement/delete paths now use the shared helpers, including:

- `sessions.patch`
- `sessions.delete`
- `sessions.reset`
- agent writeback
- node-event store touches
- resolver sync
- `sessions.compaction.restore`
- compaction checkpoint metadata persistence

Preserved raw aliases stay internal-only for lookup continuity: `sessions.list` filtering/search/count collapses a raw+canonical alias pair into one visible canonical session row.

## Real Behavior Proof

Current PR head: `e60d57959f2c5f4fa48b366fb8798ec721c1decc`

Rebased onto `upstream/main`: `b86435f0b597e58cd2eb904fe7fa12f881ca4dba`

Direct source-checkout proof on the current head:

```json
{
  "primaryKey": "agent:main:conversation:pair:user_a::user_b:space:space_123",
  "preservedAliasKeys": [
    "conversation:pair:user_a::user_b:space:space_123"
  ],
  "afterWrite": {
    "canonicalSessionId": "sess-write",
    "rawSessionId": "sess-write",
    "rawSendPolicy": "deny",
    "sameEntry": true
  },
  "visible": {
    "listKeys": [
      "agent:main:conversation:pair:user_a::user_b:space:space_123"
    ],
    "listCount": 1,
    "listTotalCount": 1,
    "searchKeys": [
      "agent:main:conversation:pair:user_a::user_b:space:space_123"
    ],
    "searchCount": 1,
    "searchTotalCount": 1
  },
  "deleted": true,
  "afterDelete": {
    "canonicalSessionId": null,
    "rawSessionId": null
  }
}
```

New checkpoint regressions:

- `src/gateway/server.sessions.compaction.test.ts` proves `sessions.compaction.restore` updates both raw and canonical aliases and keeps only the canonical row visible.
- `src/gateway/session-compaction-checkpoints.test.ts` proves checkpoint metadata persistence writes the checkpoint to both raw and canonical aliases.

No screenshots are attached because this is backend session-store behavior with no visual UI surface.

## Validation

Ran on the rebased head:

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts src/gateway/server.sessions.store-rpc.test.ts src/gateway/server.sessions.reset-cleanup.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/agent.test.ts src/gateway/server-node-events.test.ts src/gateway/sessions-resolve.test.ts src/gateway/session-compaction-checkpoints.test.ts src/gateway/server.sessions.compaction.test.ts
Test Files  15 passed (15)
Tests       574 passed (574)
```

```text
node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/gateway/session-utils.ts src/gateway/server-methods/sessions.ts src/gateway/session-compaction-checkpoints.ts
Found 0 warnings and 0 errors.
```

```text
git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD
./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/gateway/server-methods/sessions.ts src/gateway/session-compaction-checkpoints.ts src/gateway/session-compaction-checkpoints.test.ts src/gateway/server.sessions.compaction.test.ts
```

Also ran `pnpm docs:list` before editing. Broad Testbox changed gate was not run because the `blacksmith` CLI is not installed in this environment; I kept local validation to targeted gateway proof.
target.author: stainlu
